 rec
 
Daniele D'Agnelli
 
classification: level_5 // eyes only
 
 
 
 
 
subject operates under cover as senior engagement manager at c3 ai, london. directs $15m programme with 70+ assets across multiple divisions. previous cells identified: deloitte (london), accenture (london, milan), codec (dublin). 15 years deep. high-value target.
 
secondary profile flagged: msc ethical hacking & cybersecurity — abertay university, gchq-certified programme. distinction grade. active penetration tester. reverse engineering capability confirmed. known tools: python, rust, go, linux, security tooling. active on hack the box.
 
operational impact: ceo-sponsored predictive maintenance rollout across 100+ manufacturing plants, 2,000+ end users, $18m ebit. genai rag deployment across enterprise knowledge base. sustained nps above 70.
